request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I can tell you: our allies aren't pulling their weight. The data shows they're only meeting 62% of their defense spending commitments. We can't rely on them for real security. Time to prioritize our own defenses and demand real burden-sharing. #NationalSecurityFirst
